'''''Morgannier''''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] owned by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

It was stolen by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] agent [[Kn'ik Th'ronik]] from its docking bay on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. SoroSuub then posted a reward for Th'ronik's capture and the return of the ''Morgannier''.

{{Ship-stub}}
